authorization_phrase: Authorize s14-d1 multi-instrument availability probe + DR9 audit for MES, MYM, M2K only.

contingency_paths_per_s14_d1_plan_sectio.description: MES, MYM, M2K all pass DR9 with thresholds met. 4-instrument basket is fully available.
contingency_paths_per_s14_d1_plan_sectio.next_authorization_at_separate_turn: Authorize s14-d1 multi-instrument RSI(2) bi-directional Tier-N spec DRAFT only — bound by DR10 v2.

contingency_paths_per_s14_d1_plan_sectio.description: One of MES/MYM/M2K fails DR9 (e.g., M2K thin-liquidity gap fires DR9). Per s14-d1 PLAN §3.2, the 3-symbol basket of the remaining instruments + MNQ is the contingency path.
contingency_paths_per_s14_d1_plan_sectio.next_authorization_at_separate_turn: Authorize s14-d1 shrunk-basket Tier-N spec PLAN only — bound by DR10 v2.
contingency_paths_per_s14_d1_plan_sectio.note: Shrunk-basket requires fresh candidate_record_id and re-authoring the Tier-N spec PLAN to reflect 3-symbol scope. Substitution of the failing symbol is FORBIDDEN.

contingency_paths_per_s14_d1_plan_sectio.description: Two of MES/MYM/M2K fail DR9. 2-symbol basket of remaining + MNQ may not have enough diversification or signal density; likely revert to T2 rev2 cash-equity basket alternative.
contingency_paths_per_s14_d1_plan_sectio.next_authorization_at_separate_turn: Authorize s14-d1 cash-equity 3-name basket RSI(3) bi-directional Tier-N spec PLAN only — bound by DR10 v2.
contingency_paths_per_s14_d1_plan_sectio.note: T2 rev2 from the post-s13-d1 next-track selection plan rev2 is the documented fallback.

contingency_paths_per_s14_d1_plan_sectio.description: All of MES, MYM, M2K fail DR9. Multi-instrument micro-futures hypothesis fails at data-quality gate.
contingency_paths_per_s14_d1_plan_sectio.next_authorization_at_separate_turn: Authorize s14-d1 cash-equity 3-name basket RSI(3) bi-directional Tier-N spec PLAN only — bound by DR10 v2.
contingency_paths_per_s14_d1_plan_sectio.note: Same as 2-symbol-fail contingency; T2 rev2 cash-equity alternative is the documented fallback.

contingency_paths_per_s14_d1_plan_sectio.description: DR9 audit returns INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD on any symbol (ambiguous data-quality outcome).
contingency_paths_per_s14_d1_plan_sectio.next_authorization_at_separate_turn: Operator manual review + decision; no auto-progression to DRAFT.
contingency_paths_per_s14_d1_plan_sectio.note: Analogous to s10-d1 INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD park outcome.

controller_advisory_probe.controller_finding: All three target symbols (MES.c.0, MYM.c.0, M2K.c.0) are EXPECTED to be available on GLBX.MDP3 with continuous-stitch behavior similar to MNQ.c.0 based on (a) coordinated CME launch dates in May 2019, (b) consistent Databento continuous-contract symbology, (c) known vendor docs. Controller advisory probe outcome: EXPECTED AVAILABLE — but BINDING availability + DR9 outcomes can only be determined by operator-side fetch.
controller_advisory_probe.expected_common_history_start: 2019-05-13 (matches MNQ.c.0 in audit chain; CME launched MNQ/MES/MYM/M2K as a coordinated micro-futures family in May 2019)
controller_advisory_probe.known_continuous_contract_convention: {symbol_root}.c.0 = front-month continuous contract (Databento convention; same as MNQ.c.0, MGC.c.0)
controller_advisory_probe.known_dataset: GLBX.MDP3 (CME Globex; same dataset as MNQ.c.0)
controller_advisory_probe.method: Controller reads (a) repository vendor docs (databento_vendor_docs/CME Globex MDP 3.0...) for known specs, (b) s10-d1 fetch manifest for prior MNQ.c.0 fetch parameters, (c) publicly-known CME equity-index micro futures launch information. No Databento call. No network IO.
vendor_docs_available_in_repo: databento_vendor_docs/CME Globex MDP 3.0 _ CME futures historical & live data API.html

audit_result_schema_per_instrument.csv_sha256: string (verified by controller at audit turn)
audit_result_schema_per_instrument.dr9_failure_branches_if_any: array of branch names that failed

per_instrument_check_procedure: Step 1: Verify the captured CSV exists at the expected path
Step 2: Verify CSV sha256 against the recorded value in the operator-captured fetch manifest
Step 3: Parse CSV; verify schema matches sparta.databento.ohlcv_1d.continuous (fields: ts_event, open, high, low, close, volume)

Step 4: Compute gap_continuity = (number of trading days with rows) / (number of expected trading days between first_ts and last_ts based on a CME-Globex US-equity-index session calendar). Threshold: >= 0.95
Step 5: Compute max_gap_ratio = max(consecutive missing trading days) / total trading days. Threshold: <= 0.30 (any single gap longer than 30% of the total window flags failure)

Step 6: Count roll_event_count via detected discontinuities (price-level jumps consistent with futures roll). For continuous-stitch contracts on CME equity-index micros, expected ~24 quarterly rolls over 6.6y window — RESHAPE this threshold context: the s10-d1 DR9 threshold of <=5 was for ROLL EVENTS THAT VIOLATE STITCH QUALITY (not all roll events). Confirm with operator at audit turn what 'roll_event_count' captures in the s10-d1 framework.
Step 7: Count quality_violation_count = total checks failed across (bar OHLC sanity: low<=open<=high AND low<=close<=high; volume>=0; ts_event monotonic; no duplicate ts_event). Threshold: <= 5
Step 8: Aggregate: per-instrument DR9 status = PASS if ALL thresholds met; FAIL otherwise. INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD if any threshold is ambiguous (per s12-d1 DR9 outcome class).

explicit_exclusions_this_turn: No DR9 audit RESULTS sealed (only the framework is pre-authored; results require operator-captured CSVs at a future turn)
No SEAL (this RUN_BOOK is not a sealed artifact)
No modification of any existing sealed artifact

operator_side_fetch_run_book.executor: operator (DATABENTO_API_KEY in operator's environment only; controller never reads the key)
operator_side_fetch_run_book.post_fetch_action: Operator confirms each CSV exists at the expected path, the manifest file exists with sha256 entries for each CSV, and types `Authorize s14-d1 multi-instrument availability probe + DR9 audit RESULT SEALING only.` to invoke controller-side DR9 audit + result sealing in a separate authorization turn.

report_kind: RUN_BOOK / operator-side fetch instructions + pre-authored DR9 audit framework for MES.c.0, MYM.c.0, M2K.c.0. NOT a sealed Tier-N or framework artifact. Status PENDING operator-side fetch; controller cannot make Databento calls per s14-d1 PLAN hard boundaries.
scope_of_this_run_book: Controller-side advisory probe: based on vendor docs (databento_vendor_docs/) + publicly-known CME equity-index micro futures specifications + s10-d1 fetch precedent
Pre-authored DR9 audit framework: per-instrument check structure + thresholds carried byte-equivalent from s10-d1 audit
Operator-side fetch RUN_BOOK: explicit step-by-step instructions for the operator to perform a Databento fetch with the DATABENTO_API_KEY held only in the operator's environment
Expected operator-captured artifacts: manifest + 3 CSVs at specified paths
Contingency tree: per s14-d1 PLAN §3.2 (1-symbol fail / 2-symbol fail / 3-symbol fail / all pass)
Future result-sealing scope: separate authorization required for sealing the audit result after operator-side fetch completes
